infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Borkd uses your location to track your dog walks and show nearby community pins.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Borkd needs background location access to accurately track your walk route while your phone is in your pocket.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Borkd to access your photos to add walk selfies and pin photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Borkd needs background location access to accurately track your walk route while your phone is in your pocket.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Borkd uses your location to track your dog walks and show nearby community pins.
